requirements.description: MC_03.DIV8 emits tuple_u8_u8 with executable generated tests for TypeScript, Python, and Rust.
Generated TypeScript conditions keep parentheses for boolean literals and branch expressions.
Generated Rust f64 branch and method-call cases compile and test without warnings inside the Beta15.3 gate.
Inline polymer output is a certifiable .polymer.pcd with domains and boundary contracts before functions.
The 128 monomer regression gate passes against the Beta15.3 local candidate.
GitHub release, curl installer, web, docs, SDKs, skills, changelog, and live verification are not yet synchronized for public publication.
L6+N5 generation/homologation evidence has not yet been refreshed for this candidate.
